page_metadata.biotools__summary: BubbleGun is a tool for detecting Bubbles and Superbubble in De-bruijn graphs. BubbleGun outputs runs of bubbles and superbubbles we call bubble chains.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BubbleGun is a tool for detecting Bubbles and Superbubble in De-bruijn graphs. BubbleGun outputs runs of bubbles and superbubbles we call bubble chains.
